articles.title: It’s Official: A Second Country Has Made Bitcoin Legal Tender
articles.description: This episode is sponsored by Nexo.io, Arculus and FTX US. It’s another global crypto adoption and regulation roundup, led by confirmation that the Central African Republic is moving to make bitcoin legal tender, alongside the CFA franc. NLW looks at why this is significant in a historical, postcolonial context.
